Decoding
The Words

शब्दले संसार
बदल्छ

तपाईंको शब्द, तपाईंको संसार

The W-O-R-D Framework

A four-step process to escape the social trap and transform your internal dialogue.

W

Wisdomबुद्धिमत्त

The power of choosing the right words

O

Observationअवलोकन

Watching how your words affect your body and confidence

R

Repetitionदोहोऱ्याउने

Strengthening belief by repeating positive affirmations

D

Disciplineअनुशासन

Daily consistency in turning plans into action

The Ultimate Equation

W.O.R.D + L (Learning + Leverage) = WORLD
